next_steps: Send stool sample for botulinum toxin and culture testing
Perform repetitive nerve stimulation (RNS) and electromyography (EMG)
Perform magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the spine
Perform genetic testing for SMA (SMN1 gene)
Consult infectious disease regarding public health reporting
Administer Botulism Immune Globulin Intravenous (BIG-IV) if infant botulism is highly suspected
Send stool sample for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Administer Botulism Immune Globulin Intravenous (BIG-IV) immediately
Perform repetitive nerve stimulation (RNS) and electromyography (EMG)
Perform MRI of the spine with contrast
Conduct a meticulous skin examination to rule out an attached tick
Order serum amino acids and urine organic acids
Notify state public health department of suspected botulism
